segments.text: Whether they'll mixup or not is unclear, but up smash is definitely the right call! And in that situation too, continuing with the optimal play—that's Grapplemint! Stock 2 to 1!
segments.original_text: めくるかめくらないかわかんないだけは確かに上スマでいいか さああの状況でも最も正しい行動をし続けるのがやはりグラトニー ストック2対1

segments.text: They've really got that spacing down! 167.2%... Incredible! This pace is insane! Incredible! Shut down the dash!
segments.original_text: 外使い込んでんだなぁこれ167.2 うまい!うますぎるこの展開で!うまい!ダッシュを潰した!

segments.text: Whoa! What is this?! Shut down the jump!
segments.original_text: ふぅー!これは? ジャンプを潰したー!
うまい! フルセット?

full_text: Whether they'll mixup or not is unclear, but up smash is definitely the right call! And in that situation too, continuing with the optimal play—that's Grapplemint! Stock 2 to 1! They've really got that spacing down! 167.2%... Incredible! This pace is insane! Incredible! Shut down the dash! Whoa! What is this?! Shut down the jump! Incredible! Full set?!

corrections.corrected: グラトニー ストック2対1
corrections.rule: Player name: グラトニ→グラトニー; format: 21→2対1
